title: open-webui setup on macOS
content: open-webui setup on macOS ========================= :date: 2026-04-03 00:21 :category: Tech :tags: python, open-webui, macos      Here’s how to set up Open WebUI as a launchd service on macOS.  ----  Prerequisites -------------  First, install Open WebUI via uv if you haven’t already:  .. code:: bash     uv tool install open-webui  ----  1. Create the plist file ------------------------  .. code:: sh     cat > ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.user.openwebui.plist << EOF    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>    <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">    <plist version="1.0"><dict>      <key>Label</key><string>com.user.openwebui</string>      <key>ProgramArguments</key><array>        <string>$HOME/.local/share/uv/tools/open-webui/b...

title: CudaText installation and config for SublimeText users
content: CudaText installation and config for SublimeText users ====================================================== :date: 2026-04-03 01:08 :category: Tech :tags: IDE, text-editor, CudaText  https://github.com/Alexey-T/CudaText  macOS releases -------------- *Go for aarch64 releases*  https://github.com/Alexey-T/CudaText/discussions/5590#discussioncomment-15352982  Tweaks ------ Post-installation ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ .. code-block:: sh      xattr -cr /Applications/CudaText.app  .zshrc ~~~~~~ .. code-block:: text      # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------     # CudaText     # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------     alias cudatext="/Applications/CudaText.app/Contents/MacOS/cudatext"  Plugins list ------------ https://gi...
